query:
-- Insert ABB Opticomm pricebook entries
INSERT INTO supplier_product_cost_map (supplier, productCategory, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice)
VALUES
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 12/1',    62.72, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 25/10',   71.82, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 50/20',   80.91, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 75/20',   83.64, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 100/20',  86.36, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 100/40',  95.45, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 250/25', 108.18, NULL),
  ('ABB', 'Opticomm', 'Opticomm 1000/50',117.27, NULL)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE wholesaleCost = VALUES(wholesaleCost);

-- Apply costs to all ABB Opticomm services with unknown/zero cost
UPDATE services
SET
  monthlyCost = CASE
    WHEN planName LIKE '%12/1%'    THEN 62.72
    WHEN planName LIKE '%25/10%'   THEN 71.82
    WHEN planName LIKE '%50/20%'   THEN 80.91
    WHEN planName LIKE '%75/20%'   THEN 83.64
    WHEN planName LIKE '%100/20%'  THEN 86.36
    WHEN planName LIKE '%100/40%'  THEN 95.45
    WHEN planName LIKE '%250/25%'  THEN 108.18
    WHEN planName LIKE '%1000/50%' THEN 117.27
    ELSE monthlyCost
  END,
  costSource = 'abb_opticomm_kent_pricing',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE provider = 'ABB'
  AND planName LIKE '%Opticomm%'
  AND (costSource = 'unknown' OR monthlyCost = 0)
  AND status NOT IN ('terminated', 'archived');
